channel.title: Rosin & Rye
channel.description: Rosin & Rye — ideas, experiments, and things worth writing about.

item.title: Katy Hill
item.description: A look at Katy Hill, old-time's most-traveled breakdown tune, its origins, and who plays it well.
item.author: Reese Krome

item.title: Sally Goodin
item.description: A look at Sally Goodin, the Texas showpiece that put old-time fiddling on record for the first time.
item.author: Reese Krome

item.title: Cotton Patch Rag
item.description: A look at Cotton Patch Rag, Mark O'Connor's ragtime-influenced fiddle tune and what makes it worth learning.
item.author: Reese Krome

item.title: Washington County
item.description: The story behind the fiddle tune Washington County and the fiddler who made it famous.
item.author: Reese Krome

item.title: Welcome to Rosin & Rye
item.description: A first post to kick things off.
item.author: Rosin & Rye
